name: Copying Sensitive Files with Credential Data
notes:
This rule detects attempts to copy sensitive files with credential data.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Copying Sensitive Files with Credential Data
SIGMA Description: Files with well-known filenames (sensitive files with credential data) copying


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\windows\ntds\ntds.dit%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\sam%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\security%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\system %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\repair\sam%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\repair\system%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\repair\security%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\regback\sam%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\regback\system%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\regback\security%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Copying Sensitive Files with Credential Data on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\windows\ntds\ntds.dit%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\sam%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\security%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\system %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\repair\sam%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\repair\system%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\repair\security%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\regback\sam%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\regback\system%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\config\regback\security%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Copying Sensitive Files with Credential Data
Event description: Detects attempts to copy sensitive files with credential data.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
